tasks.subject: Add client-side search filter to remote browse panel
tasks.description: Add type-ahead search filtering to the remote package browse UI (selectBrowseAction in src/ui/remote.ts). Mirror the pattern from the main /extensions panel: press `/` or `f` to activate search, type to filter, Esc to clear. Filter packages by name/description substring match, keep nav items always visible. Rebuild SelectList with filtered items + nav items on each keystroke.
tasks.activeForm: Adding search filter to remote browse panel
